title: Loka Fabric
description: A client-side modpack for use on Loka, reimagined.
body:
# A Fabric Modpack for Loka.


*This modpack features a handful of mods, all of which are allowed on Loka. Loka has very strict guidelines when it comes to client mods, you can learn more here: https://forums.lokamc.com/threads/approved-legal-client-side-mods.4845/*

*This is an unofficial Modpack, it is in no way officially related to Loka, it is made by the community!*

## List of mods:

**Performance**
Sodium,
Lithium,
FerriteCore,
EntityCulling,
BadOptimizations,
ImmediatelyFast,
ModernFix,
MoreCulling

**Utility + Library**
Fabric API,
Mod Menu,
Malilib,
Litematica,
Minihud,
Appleskin,
Zoomify,
YACL,
Kotlin,
Uku Armor Hud,
Ukulib,
text placeholder API,
Gamma Utils,
kennytvforcecloseloadingscreen,
Axiom,
Status Effect Timer


**Aesthetic**
Iris,
Capes,
Mod Loading Screen,
Better Clouds

### Installation

To install this Modpack, I suggest using either Modrinth App (https://modrinth.com/app) or Prism (https://prismlauncher.org). When using either of these, you can easily search for this Modpack in the Modrinth browser and install in just a few clicks! NOTE: 1.20.6 requires Java 21!

Step 1: Click "Add Instance"
Step 2: Click "Modrinth"
Step 3: In the searchbar, type "Loka Fabric"
Step 4: Select the correct version, then click "OK"
Step 5: Profit
<details>

<summary>Instructions in Spanish</summary>
Para instalar este Modpack sugiero usar Modrinth App (https://modrinth.com/app) o Prism (https://prismlauncher.org). Al usar cualquiera de estos, puede buscar fácilmente este Modpack en el navegador Modrinth e instalarlo con solo unos pocos clics.

Paso 1: haga clic en "Agregar instancia"
Paso 2: Haga clic en "Modrinth"
Paso 3: En la barra de búsqueda, escriba "Loka Fabric"
Paso 4: Seleccione la versión correcta, luego haga clic en "Aceptar"
Paso 5: Beneficio
</details>
<details>

<summary>Instructions in Turkish</summary>
Bu Modları indirmek için, Modrinth App (https://modrinth.com/app) ya da Prism (prismlauncher.org/) kullanmanızı tavsiye ediyorum. Bu ikisinden birini kullanırken, Modrinth tarayıcı kısmından bu mod paketini aratabilir, ve sadece bir kaç basit adımla indirebilirsiniz!

Aşama 1: “Add Instance” a tıklayın.
Aşama 2: “Modrinth” e tıklayın.
Aşama 3: Arama kısmında, “Loka Fabric” yazıp aratın.
Aşama 4: Doğru versiyonu seçin, ve ardından “OK” e tıklayın.
Aşama 5: İyi eğlenceler!
</details>
<details> 

<summary>Instructions in Korean</summary>
이 Modpack을 설치하려면 Modrinth App (https://modrinth.com/app) 또는 Prism(https://prismlauncher.org)을 사용하는 것이 좋습니다. 이 중 하나를 사용하면 Modrinth 브라우저에서 이 Modpack을 쉽게 검색하고 몇 번의 클릭만으로 설치할 수 있습니다.

1단계 – "인스턴스 추가"를 클릭합니다.
2단계: "모드린스"를 클릭합니다.
3단계: 검색창에 "Loka Fabric"을 입력합니다.
4단계: 올바른 버전을 선택한 다음 "확인"을 클릭합니다.
5단계: 이익
</details>
<details>

<summary>Instructions in Polish</summary>
Aby zainstalować ten pakiet modów, sugeruję użycie Modrinth App (https://modrinth.com/app) lub Prism (https://prismlauncher.org). Korzystając z dowolnego z nich, możesz łatwo wyszukać ten pakiet modów w przeglądarce Modrinth i zainstalować go za pomocą zaledwie kilku kliknięć.

Krok 1 – Kliknij „Dodaj instancję”
Krok 2: Kliknij „Modrinth”
Krok 3: W pasku wyszukiwania wpisz „Loka Fabric”
Krok 4: Wybierz poprawną wersję, a następnie kliknij „OK”
Krok 5: Zysk
</details>

**Looking for a Minecraft host? Check out [Lagless.gg](https://lagless.spellbound.sh/)**
